provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Rent Control Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation

definitions.definition: a person who lets premises on behalf of a landlord or collects rents in respect of premises on behalf of a landlord or is authorised by such landlord to do so

a building or part of a building separately let or a room separately let which is used mainly for business, trade or professional purposes, and includes land occupied therewith under a tenancy, but does not include a building, part of a building or a room when let with agricultural land
the controlled rent of premises as ascertained and certified by the Tribunal under section 6

a building or part of a building separately let or a room separately let which is used mainly as a dwelling or place of residence, and includes land occupied therewith under a tenancy, but does not include a building, part of a building or a room when let with agricultural land
any fine or other like sum and any other pecuniary consideration in addition to rent
a sub-tenant and any person deriving title from the original tenant or sub-tenant, as the case may be
the Rent Control Tribunal established under section 4.
